turns.user_message: I was sitting alone at dinner last night and it just felt heavy. I realized I had nobody to tell about my day.
That empty feeling has been following me around for weeks now. I keep wondering why I don't matter enough for anyone to check in.
I'm starting to believe I'm just not a person people want to keep around. It feels like I'm fading away and nobody would even notice.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by referencing a specific recent moment.
